tasks.subject: Task 1: internal/uistate package
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cookie type + parser + encoder, with defensive parsing (malformed/oversize cookies fall through to the zero state) and unit tests.

**Files:**
- Create: `internal/uistate/state.go`
- Create: `internal/uistate/state_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/uistate/...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/uistate/state.go", "internal/uistate/state_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/uistate/...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Parse returns zero State on missing/malformed/oversize cookie", "Cookie + Parse round-trip preserves Details and Preset maps", "DefaultsForDevice returns Open:0 Automode:false Match:true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extend DeviceView and wire cookie into buildView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add DetailsOpen, EditingPreset, Automode, MatchSpeeds to DeviceView. Drop SensorsView.Expanded. buildView parses the cookie and applies cookie + force-open rules + section defaults.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/view.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui_view.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_read.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_read_test.go`

**Verify:** `just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/... ./internal/uistate/...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/view.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui_view.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_read.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_read_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/... ./internal/uistate/...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new DeviceView fields populated", "SensorsView.Expanded removed", "force-open rules applied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update details templates + card data attributes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All four `<details>` blocks read open from v.DetailsOpen[…]. Card root gains data-speed-mode + data-airflow-mode. Render goldens regenerated.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/device_card.templ`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensors_block.templ`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/energy_block.templ`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/schedule_block.templ`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go` and testdata/golden_*.html

**Verify:** `just generate && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/device_card.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensors_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/energy_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/schedule_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just generate && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["details open from DetailsOpen", "card root has data-speed-mode/data-airflow-mode", "goldens pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Render the preset editor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** controlsBlock emits 3 preset-editor panels per card with hidden driven by v.EditingPreset, automode + match-speeds checkboxes from view fields, sliders wired for htmx POSTs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/controls_block.templ`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go` and testdata/golden_editor_open_preset2.html

**Verify:** `just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/controls_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/testdata/golden_editor_open_preset2.html"], "verifyCommand": "just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 preset-editor panels rendered", "checkboxes reflect view", "slider POSTs wired"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: POST /ui/devices/{name}/preset shim handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New htmx-shim endpoint that decodes form-encoded preset/supply/extract, calls breezy.SetPresetSpeed, re-renders the card. Validation errors render DeviceCard with PostError set.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPostUIPreset -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPostUIPreset -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["200 on success", "422 on validation error", "401/502 on backend error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: layout.templ — cookie helper + #49 retrofit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the htmx:afterSettle re-apply pass with a setUIState cookie helper and a summary-click handler that writes the cookie. After this task, `<details>` open state survives polls without flicker.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/layout.templ`
- Modify: `tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts` (lines 783, 798, 812)

**Verify:** `just test-ui --grep "open state survives polls"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/layout.templ", "tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "just test-ui --grep 'open state survives polls'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["details shim deleted", "cookie helpers in place", "no-flicker tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: layout.templ — preset chip + checkbox + slider JS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire all preset-editor interactions: chip click, manual/mode/manual-slider close, automode + match-speeds checkbox handlers (#46.2 transition), htmx:configRequest snap-to-zero + match-speeds sync, post-slider implied-mode write.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/layout.templ`
- Modify: `tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts` (un-fixme lines 893, 913, 919, 925, 930, 935, 940, 946, 951, 956, 961; add 4 new tests)

**Verify:** `just test-ui`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/layout.templ", "tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preset interactions wired", "automode #46.2 fires regen", "slider snap + match sync", "implied-mode write per spec", "11 unfixme'd tests pass", "4 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Final Playwright sweep + screenshot
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm full Playwright suite green; regenerate the README screenshot showing the restored editor.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/ui/screenshot.ts`
- Regenerate: `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png`

**Verify:** `just check-all`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/ui/screenshot.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check-all green", "screenshot shows restored editor", "issues closed post-merge"]}
```
